standard_deliverables.title: Standard Deliverables
standard_deliverables.message:
Our standard assignment includes:

- 100% color-corrected high-resolution digital files
- 1 premium flush-mount hardcover heirloom album
- 3-minute cinematic trailer
- 45-minute documentary film

All photos are professionally edited and color-graded to our signature style.

team_size.title: Team Size & Allocation
team_size.message:
Depending on your guest count, we deploy a disciplined team of 4 to 6 professionals including:

- Dedicated candid shooters
- Traditional photographers
- Cinematographers
- Certified drone operator

All team members are experienced and professionally trained.

production_equipment.title: Production & Equipment
production_equipment.message:
We record natively in 4K resolution utilizing:

- Full-frame Sony/Canon cinema bodies
- Specialized low-light prime glass
- Electronic stabilization gimbals
- Multi-channel audio systems
- DJI drones for aerial shots

We use only professional-grade equipment to ensure the highest quality output.

coverage_policy.title: Coverage & Overtime Policy
coverage_policy.message:
Our primary wedding packages include:

- Up to 12 hours of active shooting per day
- Our core team remains on-site to fully cover late-night pheras and traditional send-offs
- No additional fee for extended coverage
- Transparent and clear policy

We ensure every important moment is captured, no matter the time.

signature_highlights.title: Signature Highlights
signature_highlights.message:
You can browse our live, curated gallery of real weddings and watch award-winning cinematic films directly here:

Portfolio Link: https://www.fotographiya.com/portfolio
Watch Films: https://www.fotographiya.com/films
Gallery: https://www.fotographiya.com/gallery

See why couples trust us with their special day.

custom_inquiries.title: Custom Inquiries
custom_inquiries.message:
Please type your specific question regarding our workflow below, and a production manager will review it immediately.

Type your question in the chat box below and our team will respond shortly.

Or email us directly at: info@fotographiya.com

pre_wedding.title: Pre-Wedding Package
pre_wedding.message:
Pre-Wedding Photography Package

Package Includes:
- 4-5 hours photoshoot
- 2-3 locations
- 150+ edited photos
- Professional styling guidance
- 2-minute teaser video
- Online gallery

Price: Starting from ₹25,000

Book your pre-wedding shoot today!

options.label: Book this Package for My Date

wedding_package.title: Wedding Package
wedding_package.message:
Complete Wedding Photography Package

Package Includes:
- 10-12 hours coverage
- 500+ edited photos
- 45-minute documentary film
- 3-minute cinematic trailer
- Premium heirloom album
- Online gallery
- Second photographer

Price: Starting from ₹55,000

Book your wedding coverage!

options.label: Book this Package for My Date

destination_package.title: Destination Wedding Package
destination_package.message:
Complete Destination Wedding Package

Package Includes:
- Full event coverage (2-3 days)
- 1000+ edited photos
- 2 documentary films
- Multiple cinematic teasers
- Premium albums (2 copies)
- Travel and accommodation included
- Team of 6 professionals

Price: Starting from ₹1,20,000

Book your dream destination wedding!

bespoke_pricing.message:

check_availability.title: Check Our Availability
check_availability.message:
Check if your date is available!

Please provide your event date and we'll check availability:

Type your date in the chat box (e.g., December 15, 2025)

We recommend booking at least 6 months in advance for wedding photography.

Popular dates fill up quickly, especially during wedding season (Nov - Feb).
